name: Brute Force Chili ("Electro-sport Chili")
recipeIngredient: 4-6 lbs Chuck roast or Shredded Beef
1 TB Garlic powder or fresh garlic cloves
8 Yellow chili peppers, stems removed and seeds squeezed out
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the Chuck roast or Shredded Beef into bite-size pieces.
2. In a pan or two, brown the meat with a little oil.
3. Add garlic powder or fresh garlic cloves and cook until fragrant.
4. Dice the onion and add to the pot.
5. Drain off excess fat if necessary.
6. Stir in stewed tomatoes (or tomato cans), beef broth, brown gravy mix, Cajun seasoning, ground cumin, oregano/Italian spices, black pepper, paprika, brown sugar, diced green chilis, yellow chili peppers (stemmed and seeded), beer, vinegar, and lime juice.
7. Mix everything thoroughly in the pot.
8. Cook on low heat for at least 2 hours. If needed, thicken with flour or cornstarch; thin with water or more beer.
9. Serve with shredded cheese and desired toppings.
